experiments.hypothesis: A proof-first X thread with a real revenue number and one concrete buyer scene drives more replies than a generic product post.
experiments.variant_b: Money-proof thread with before/after operator scene

experiments.hypothesis: A genuine, specific warm follow-up to decaying leads converts better than waiting for inbound.
experiments.variant_b: Context-specific follow-up referencing their last signal

experiments.hypothesis: Adding a frictionless checkout link immediately after proof assets increases click-through and purchase intent.
